summary: Full regression testing of multi-branch feature and all pages. Fixed 2 frontend bugs: AccountingPage API response mismatch and SalesPage using deprecated /api/sales endpoint. All 17 requested features verified working.

minor.issue: Returns array directly instead of {receivables: []} - frontend expects wrapped object format
Returns array directly instead of {payables: []} - frontend expects wrapped object format
Endpoint does not exist - sales are now stored in /api/invoices. Legacy compatibility removed during modular refactor

issues: Minor HTML hydration warning in table - '<tr> cannot be child of <span>' - cosmetic issue, not blocking

passed_tests: LOGIN: Admin login (admin/admin123) - SUCCESS - redirects to dashboard
LOGIN: Cashier login (cashier/password) - SUCCESS - shows branch-restricted view
MULTI-BRANCH: Admin sees Owner Dashboard with 'All Branches' view showing consolidated data
MULTI-BRANCH: Branch selector in sidebar allows switching between 'All Branches' and individual branches
MULTI-BRANCH: Switching to specific branch shows single-branch Dashboard (data-testid='dashboard-page')
MULTI-BRANCH: Cashier does NOT see branch selector - shows locked branch with 🔒 icon
DASHBOARD APIs: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns correct aggregated data
DASHBOARD APIs: GET /api/dashboard/branch-summary returns branch-level breakdown for 5 branches
PRODUCTS PAGE: Products list loads correctly
INVENTORY PAGE: Inventory list loads correctly
CUSTOMERS PAGE: Customer list respects branch filtering
COUNT SHEETS PAGE: Count sheets list loads and shows branch-appropriate data
DAILY OPS PAGE: /daily-ops page loads without runtime errors (bug was fixed)
SALES PAGE: Sales page loads correctly (using /api/invoices)
PURCHASE ORDERS: Purchase orders page loads correctly
ACCOUNTING PAGE: Accounting/expenses page loads correctly (after fix)
NAVIGATION: All sidebar links navigate to correct pages without errors
ADDITIONAL: Suppliers page loads
ADDITIONAL: Settings page loads
ADDITIONAL: User Permissions page loads
ADDITIONAL: Fund Management page loads
critical_code_review_comments: API response format inconsistency: /api/receivables and /api/payables return arrays directly while /api/expenses returns {expenses: [...]}. Recommend standardizing all list endpoints to use wrapped format for consistency.
The /api/sales GET endpoint was removed during modular refactor but SalesPage.js still referenced it. Fixed by using /api/invoices instead.
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/AccountingPage.js - Fixed to handle array response from receivables/payables APIs
/app/frontend/src/pages/SalesPage.js - Updated to use /api/invoices endpoint instead of deprecated /api/sales

success_rate.backend: 100% - All API endpoints tested and working
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages loading and functional after fixes

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing test data from previous iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-branch feature fully verified. Admin sees Owner Dashboard with consolidated view across 5 branches, can switch to individual branch view. Cashier is locked to Main Branch with no branch selector. All pages load correctly. AccountingPage and SalesPage were using incorrect API endpoints - now fixed. The modular backend routes work correctly. Key data-testid attributes: 'owner-dashboard' for consolidated view, 'dashboard-page' for single branch, 'branch-selector' for the dropdown.
